title: Create: Far and above!
description:
This modpack is interesting to say the least, with a combo of greg tech, create, AE2, destroy, mekanisim, the list goes on

This modpacks aim is to have fun, and just to have a balance. I couldn't find any good packs that had groups of good mods so...
body:
This modpack is interesting to say the least, with a combo of greg tech, create, AE2, destroy, mekanisim, the list goes on.


This modpacks aim is to have fun, and just to have a balance. I couldn't find any good packs that had groups of good, but unrelated mods. So in total this pack aims to fill a much needed void.
